title: Fix test suite failures with go >= 1.10
body:
The `hack/common.sh` script contains
```sh
    local go_version
    go_version=($(go version))
    if [[ "${go_version[2]}" < "go1.5" ]]; then
      # fail
    fi
```
which does a lexicographic string comparison, and fails with 1.10. Just drop it, the `fedora:latest` image is not likely to revert to 1.5.
